v2_sources.title: Safety and antitumour activity of cadonilimab, an anti-PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific antibody, for patients with advanced solid tumours (COMPASSION-03): a multicentre, open-label, phase 1b/2 trial - Supplementary Appendix 2
v2_sources.citation: Safety and antitumour activity of cadonilimab, an anti-PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific antibody, for patients with advanced solid tumours (COMPASSION-03): a multicentre, open-label, phase 1b/2 trial - Supplementary Appendix 2. Lancet Oncology. 2023.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: Patients with advanced solid tumours (cervical cancer, esophageal carcinoma, hepatocellular carcinoma)

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Treatment-related adverse events (TRAE) occurred in 90.4% (217/240) of patients; Grade >=3 TRAE in 27.9% (67/240); immune-related AEs (irAEs) in 50.8% (122/240)', 'page': 12}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Treatment-related adverse events (TRAE) occurred in 90.4% (217/240) of patients; Grade >=3 TRAE in 27.9% (67/240); immune-related AEs (irAEs) in 50.8% (122/240)', 'page': 12}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Most common TRAEs: Anaemia (25.4%), Aspartate aminotransferase increased (19.6%), Hypothyroidism (19.6%), Alanine aminotransferase increased (18.8%), Rash (15.8%)', 'page': 12}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Most common TRAEs: Anaemia (25.4%), Aspartate aminotransferase increased (19.6%), Hypothyroidism (19.6%), Alanine aminotransferase increased (18.8%), Rash (15.8%)', 'page': 12}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'TRAE leading to permanent discontinuation in 7.1% (17/240) of patients; most common causes were immune-mediated pneumonitis and infusion-related reaction (2 cases each)', 'page': 21}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'TRAE leading to permanent discontinuation in 7.1% (17/240) of patients; most common causes were immune-mediated pneumonitis and infusion-related reaction (2 cases each)', 'page': 21}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Anti-drug antibodies (ADA) treatment-emergent positive in 7.0% (14/200) of patients; Neutralizing antibodies (NAb) positive in 6.0% (12/200)', 'page': 8}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Anti-drug antibodies (ADA) treatment-emergent positive in 7.0% (14/200) of patients; Neutralizing antibodies (NAb) positive in 6.0% (12/200)', 'page': 8}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'PK analysis showed dose-proportional exposure; Median trough concentration at steady state at 6mg/kg Q2W was 5 ug/mL', 'page': 4}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'PK analysis showed dose-proportional exposure; Median trough concentration at steady state at 6mg/kg Q2W was 5 ug/mL', 'page': 4}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Receptor occupancy (RO) and CD4+Ki67+ T cell proliferation demonstrated PD-1 and CTLA-4 target engagement following cadonilimab administration', 'page': 25}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Receptor occupancy (RO) and CD4+Ki67+ T cell proliferation demonstrated PD-1 and CTLA-4 target engagement following cadonilimab administration', 'page': 25}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Median follow-up for PFS: Cervical cancer 13.1 months, Esophageal carcinoma 23.9 months, Hepatocellular carcinoma 24.3 months', 'page': 9}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Median follow-up for PFS: Cervical cancer 13.1 months, Esophageal carcinoma 23.9 months, Hepatocellular carcinoma 24.3 months', 'page': 9}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Subsequent therapies received by 30.8% (74/240) of patients; most common was chemotherapy (17.9%)', 'page': 22}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Subsequent therapies received by 30.8% (74/240) of patients; most common was chemotherapy (17.9%)', 'page': 22}
